pullRequest.title: [DOM-55047] Add the flows run details view

nodes.body: Should we replace the `start-node` and `end-node` with the constants you defined?
Does it make sense if we define the columns as an object? Then we avoid calling this function every time the component is re-rendered (unless this does not happen)
I remember we have had issues in the past with the current table and static columns, that's the main reason why I chose a function
No quote is needed at left side.

In the context of an object attribute it should not be an issue. This type is defined by the Flyte API:
https://docs.flyte.org/en/latest/protos/docs/core/core.html#ref-flyteidl-core-binding

![image](https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/assets/142441807/758059c1-8f6d-499e-8483-fa0d869c7d44)
Yes, it is not ideal, but we don't have a choice. It is fine.
